questionHtml: The processes of photosynthesis and respiration have some factors in common and others differ. Compare and contrast both processes for specific factors.

meta.title: The processes of photosynthesis and respiration have some factors in common and others differ. Compare and contrast both processes for specific factors.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.4. Cell respiration as a system for producing ATP within the cell using energy released from carbon compounds
B4.2.3. Photosynthesis as the mode of nutrition in plants, algae and several groups of photosynthetic prokaryotes
